description: Product Description High Performance Laptop Batteries Our laptops batteries have become essential to how we do business, communicate with friends, shop online and many more. That's why you need to treat your machine with care and due diligence. Batterytec high performance laptop batteries you can count on; batteries that can keep up with you and your schedule. Our laptop batteries are constructed to meet or exceed OEM specifications for safety and efficiency, yet we still manage to create an economical alternative to expensive OEM batteries. Packed with essential safety features - When it comes to laptop batteries - Batterytec is your best bet ! Smart Control Chip Built in smart control chip conveniently offers quicker charging, lower power consumption and longer discharge time. Perfect Fit All of our batteries are brand new and are 100% compatible to meet OEM specifications for safety and efficiency. Full Capacity All of our batteries are rigorously tested to meet or exceed OEM's specifications. Working Leisure Shopping Gaming This Laptop Battery can replace the following part number: Thinkpad: 45N1164 45N1165 45N1166 45N1167 This Laptop Battery is also compatible with the following models: Thinkpad: S5 S530 S531 S540
